array.string: mkdir -p "$HOME/Library/Application Support/DiscStream/logs"; set -a; . "$HOME/Library/Application Support/DiscStream/config/discstream.env"; set +a; cd "/path/to/DiscStream"; exec pnpm --filter @discstream/server start >> "$HOME/Library/Application Support/DiscStream/logs/server.out.log" 2>> "$HOME/Library/Application Support/DiscStream/logs/server.err.log"
